scenes.title: Master the 2% Rule
scenes.spokenText: Ever wondered how top traders stay in the game forever? It all comes down to one single rule: Never risk more than two percent of your capital on a single trade.

scenes.title: Edge of Compounding
scenes.spokenText: By limiting your downside, you allow the power of math to work for you. Even a string of losses won't wipe you out, but a few wins will surge your wealth upward.

scenes.title: Your Daily Checklist
scenes.spokenText: To use this today: always check your balance first. Then, calculate your size based on that two percent limit, and never enter a trade without a hard stop loss already in place.

scenes.subtitle: Protect your account
scenes.spokenText: Successful trading isn't about making a million overnight. It's about protecting what you have so you can dominate tomorrow. Start smart today.
